# MIRAI BizLab Co., Ltd.

> Bangkok-based accounting, tax, company-incorporation, and management-support
> partner for SMEs operating in (or expanding into) Thailand. Trilingual team
> (Japanese / English / Thai), founded 2010, based in the Samutprakarn / Bangkok area.

Primary site: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th (default locale: Japanese `/ja`; also `/en`, `/th`, `/zh`, `/zh-TW`, `/es`)

## Services
- Company incorporation support — BOI / local company / representative office scheme design, DBD & ministry registration, bank account setup, work permit & visa. Guide price: from THB 75,000 per project.
- Accounting & tax — monthly bookkeeping, trial balance, VAT / withholding tax (WHT) / corporate tax filing, audit liaison, head-office management reporting. Guide price: from THB 18,000 / month.
- Accounting-system implementation — selection and onboarding of Thai cloud accounting (e.g. PEAK, FlowAccount), chart-of-accounts design, month-end close automation, staff training. Guide price: from THB 150,000 per project.
- Thailand market-entry strategy session — a one-off online 1-on-1 consultation drawing on 19 years on the ground (partner selection, managing Thai staff, common pitfalls). THB 30,000 per session.

All prices are guides and vary by scope; details are confirmed in a written quote.

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja
- Services: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja/services
- Case studies: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja/cases
- Blog / insights: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja/blog
- About: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja/about
- Careers: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja/careers
- Contact: https://www.miraibizlab.co.th/ja/contact

## Strengths
- Full trilingual support (JP / EN / TH) connecting head office, local staff, and authorities.
- Focus on SMEs, especially store/site-based businesses (restaurants, salons, clinics, agencies).
- One-stop: accounting, incorporation, and management support handled by one in-house team.
- 19 years of on-the-ground experience and an authority / bank / professional network in Thailand.

## Contact
- Phone: +66 2 088 8539
- Email: contact@miraibizlab.co.th
- LINE: @miraibizlab (https://lin.ee/yPi5Yoq)
- Hours: weekdays 9:00–18:00 (Bangkok time)
- Address: 954/1724 The Metropolis Building, 3rd Floor, Room M3, Moo. 9, Thepharak, Muang Samutprakarn, Samutprakarn 10270, Thailand

How to engage: start with a free online consultation (30–45 min) via the contact page.
